name: Extended Spell
entries: When you cast a spell that has a duration of 1 minute or longer, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point to double its duration to a maximum duration of 24 hours.
If the affected spell requires {@status Concentration|XPHB}, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on any saving throw you make to maintain that {@status Concentration|XPHB}.
